title: A-SDLC Stage Definition
description: Schema for per-stage definition files (stages/NN-name/NN-name.yaml). Lists required controls, exit criteria, and artifact paths for one lifecycle stage.

description.description: Purpose of the stage. Answers: what work happens here and why?

required_controls.description: Control IDs that must execute within this stage.

id.description: Control identifier. Must exist in controls/registry.yaml.

note.description: Optional sequencing or conditionality note for this control in this stage.

exit_criteria.description: Conditions that must be true before the stage is considered complete.

next_stage.description: Stage number that follows this one. Null for Stage 6 (no bounded exit).

process.description: Relative path to the process.md file for this stage (always 'process.md').

artifacts.description: Paths to input and output artifact templates, relative to the stage directory.

inputs.description: Paths to artifacts consumed by this stage (produced by earlier stages).

outputs.description: Paths to artifact templates produced by this stage's controls.

directives.description: Paths to directive YAML files injected at this stage's entry (SC-2B payloads).
